Hey! It’s Tivadar from The Palindrome.
If you are a regular reader, you probably know that now you can watch as well! We already did our first live stream [ https://substack.com/redirect/cbe89bb5-0247-47ea-813e-8b07121c05d6?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ] here on Substack, and there will be many more to come.
I am updating you on the live schedule: there are four upcoming streams in October.
October 23rd, 10:00 CET: Unscripted with Miguel Otero Pedrido  from The Neural Maze .  The Unscripted streams will be relaxed, mostly non-technical discussions with engineers, scientists, educators, industry leaders, etc. (Join here: https://open.substack.com/live-stream/71105 [ https://open.substack.com/live-stream/71105 ])
October 26th, 16:00 CET: The Palindrome Lectures, session three: Computational Graphs in Python. This is available for paid subscribers on the annual plan. If you have already registered, you’ll receive the event invite soon. (If not, you can register here. [ https://substack.com/redirect/6831fb8e-821f-4ba1-a8de-b19b2cfba0b7?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ])
October 27th, 15:00 CET: Unscripted with mathematics educator and neuroscientist Mike X Cohen, PhD . (Join here: https://open.substack.com/live-stream/71110 [ https://open.substack.com/live-stream/71110 ])
October 30th, 9:00 CET: The Palindrome Office Hours, where I’ll write a future post live and answer your questions meanwhile. In this instance, the topic will be “Coding on paper”, a practice that I used to hate as a young student, but grew to appreciate later. (Join here: https://open.substack.com/live-stream/71112 [ https://open.substack.com/live-stream/71112 ])
See you soon!
Cheers,
